title: property
text: property A definable declarative characteristic of an object. For example, the widget type, initial value, and field syntax definition are all properties of a field. Related Links Property A Property is a named, typed attribute of Development Object that defines a characteristic or behavior of the object. Each property has a descriptive name, a literal name, a data type, and a value. If no value is specified, a default value may be used. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
